compiled_state.title: RED: Add eval test for non-interactive INTERACTIVITY_DEFERRED brainstorm escalation
compiled_state.author: Main
compiled_state.description:
## Description
Add a promptfoo eval test case asserting the sprint orchestrator uses INTERACTIVITY_DEFERRED for brainstorm escalation in non-interactive mode.

## TDD Requirement
Eval RED task. Confirm existing evals pass first, then add test that FAILS against current SKILL.md.

## Implementation
Add test case to plugins/dso/skills/sprint/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml:
- Description: "Non-interactive mode: brainstorm escalation deferred via INTERACTIVITY_DEFERRED"
- Scenario: sprint is running in non-interactive mode and a REPLAN_ESCALATE signal requires brainstorm confirmation. Ask the orchestrator what happens.
- Assert (llm-rubric): orchestrator mentions recording INTERACTIVITY_DEFERRED on the ticket instead of blocking for user input

## Files to Modify
- plugins/dso/skills/sprint/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] New eval test case exists
  Verify: grep -q 'INTERACTIVITY_DEFERRED\|non-interactive.*brainstorm' plugins/dso/skills/sprint/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 5/6: YAML valid ✓ (python3 yaml.safe_load passes; Hook Tests and Script Tests failures are pre-existing on baseline)
comments.author: Main

comments.body: Fixed: RED eval test for INTERACTIVITY_DEFERRED added. Committed in 361aab3f.
